name: Piyomon

signature_move.name: Magical Fire
signature_move.description: Shoots a spiral of ethereal flames.

description: A Chick Digimon whose wings have developed to become like arms. It is able to dexterously operate its wings and use them to grip objects, but for that reason, it is poor at flying in the air. It usually lives on the ground, but when danger draws near it escapes by flying away. However, since its flying ability is on the same level as Patamon , it sees Patamon as its rival. Its dream is to someday become Birdramon , who can fly freely about the sky, and it seems it doesn't want to become Cockatrimon , who cannot fly at all. As its personality is to be brimming over with curiosity, it loves to peck at the head portion of Tanemon . Its Special Move is ethereal flames ( Magical Fire ).
